description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored exterior with a predominantly off-white and green color scheme. Its design includes a broad, muscular torso with pronounced chest plating and intricate, organic-like surface detailing. The robot's arms and legs are thick and jointed, suggesting significant strength and mobility, while the hands are articulated with visible finger segments. The back is equipped with large, wing-like structures that appear mechanical and may serve as propulsion or stabilization units. The head is helmeted, with a central crest and subtle facial features integrated into the armor. Overall, the robot exudes a powerful, imposing presence suitable for urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, off-white and green humanoid robot with wing-like mechanical structures on its back and a muscular, jointed build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's broad chest, helmeted head, articulated arms, and green-accented legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the back-mounted wing structures and the thickness of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full expanse of the wing-like appendages and the segmented back armor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the layered armor and mechanical complexity of the back.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight; head facing forward and back-mounted structures extended outward.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; exterior consists of integrated armor plating and mechanical panels with organic-like surface detailing.
attribute_facial_features: Helmeted head with a central crest, subtle facial contours, and no clearly defined eyes, mouth, or nose; facial area is stylized and armored.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible joint segments at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, suggesting hinge or rotary joints; hands have articulated fingers; limbs appear robust and capable of a wide range of motion.
